name_cn:
Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️ Model 846510 Burgundy
▫️ Dimensions 22.5*14*8
 The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit element. This shoulder bag is crafted from fine glossy leather with a structured silhouette that incorporates the half-horsebit buckle design details from the 1970s. It features gold-tone hardware and is lined with three compartments and a zip pocket.
